title: Slime Diaries
description: That Time I Got Reincarnated as a Slime, Slime Diaries Modpack for Minecraft!
body:
![Slime Diaries SS 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/GWQc3LHF/images/3880abce24802b57d731668bc4f0a33e4bcdbd0f.png)

# Overworld
**Slime Diaries** is a fantasy based modpack based on the anime/manga "That Time I Got Reincarnated as a Slime, Slime Diaries". Packed to the brim with spirits, magic, skills, characters from the novels and a race selection system enjoy multiple playthroughs filled with adventure and wonder! Strike out on your own and perhaps build your own town, but be careful this modpack includes a variety of your favourite TenSura characters, demons and monsters inhabit this world, so your towns future always hangs in the balance...

[![curseforge](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/curseforge_vector.svg)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/slime-diaries)
[![modrinth](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/modrinth_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/modpack/slime-diaries)
[![kofi-plural-alt](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/donate/kofi-plural-alt_vector.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/kesselot)
# Features
- [✔️] **Vanilla+ Generation** - A subtle overhaul of the overworld filled with new dungeons, villages and more.
- [✔️] **Performance** - Made with performance in mind, this Modpack balances visuals with the needs of the player.
- [✔️] **Heaven And Back** - Death is never the end, reincarnation can grasp your soul but will you choose the light or the dark path.
- [✔️] **Slime Diaries** - Bringing the world of Tensura into Minecraft with Rimuru, monsters, tensura weapons and armour and so much more!

### Modpack Notes
- **If you are a Youtuber or Content Creator playing this Modpack, put a link in the description linking back to this page so people know the Modpack you are using.**
- **Reupload of this Modpack or any modified version is not allowed allowed on Modrinth or CurseForge, this includes redistribution to any other website.** (_Unless given explicit permission by myself_)
